hero.headline: One Platform. Four Powers. Infinite Possibilities.
hero.subheadline: From Edge to Cloud, from App to AI — YPCloud lets enterprises transform digitally without starting over.

platform.label: Platform
platform.headline: Built on Ultranet. Proven at Scale.
platform.subheadline: A patented, distributed cloud-native infrastructure connecting devices, edges, and enterprise AI.

ultranet.title: Ultranet
ultranet.desc: Distributed cloud-native networking layer connecting cloud, IoT, and edge.

motebus.title: MoteBus
motebus.desc: Patented peer-to-peer communication protocol — xMsg and xRPC.

sphere.title: SPhere
sphere.desc: Enterprise cloud in a box. Runs on PC or Raspberry Pi.

edge.title: Edge Intelligence
edge.desc: Deploy AI processing at the network edge, not just the cloud.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.headline: From IoT to AI — Without Starting Over

items.title: Industry 4.0 Integration
items.desc: Connect factory equipment, sensors, and legacy systems into a unified cloud analytics layer — no rip-and-replace required.

items.title: AI Agent Orchestration
items.desc: Deploy Flow Bot to automate complex enterprise workflows. Trigger, route, and respond — all without writing backend code.

items.title: Smart Space Deployment
items.desc: Combine Smart Screen broadcasting and IP IVR to build intelligent environments for retail, healthcare, and public spaces.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.headline: Join the Ultranet Ecosystem
ecosystem.subheadline: We build with partners, not just for them.

roles.title: Technology Partners
roles.desc: Co-develop integrations on the Ultranet Platform.

roles.title: System Integrators
roles.desc: Deploy YPCloud solutions for enterprise clients.

academy.label: Cloud Academy
academy.headline: Cultivating the Next Generation of Cloud Builders
academy.subheadline: 雲耕學院 is YPCloud's social enterprise initiative — training talent, building community, and accelerating Taiwan's cloud transition.

pillars.title: Training Programs
pillars.desc: Hands-on cloud and AI courses for students and professionals.

pillars.title: Internship Pipeline
pillars.desc: Real projects, real impact. Direct path into the industry.

pillars.title: Community Events
pillars.desc: Meetups, hackathons, and open knowledge sharing.

cloud_section.label: Distributed Cloud
cloud_section.headline: Enterprise Cloud, Built from the Core
cloud_section.desc: MoteBus, Ultranet, and AiCloud form the backbone of YPCloud's distributed infrastructure — scalable, patented, and built for the AI era.

edge_section.label: Any Edge
edge_section.headline: Edge Intelligence, Starting from the Device
edge_section.desc: Deploy compute and AI to the very edge — on industrial hardware, lightweight boards, or purpose-built devices — with zero cloud dependency.

jujue_section.label: Jujue
jujue_section.headline: A New App Ecosystem, From Community to Commerce
jujue_section.desc: Jujue reimagines how apps, services, and communities connect — blending digital commerce, smart displays, and AI agents into a single living ecosystem.

clouder_section.label: Clouder
clouder_section.headline: Low-Code Platform — Anyone Can Build the Cloud
clouder_section.desc: Clouder puts the power of cloud app development in everyone's hands, from no-code workflows to AI-augmented content and micro-media creation.

cta.headline: Ready to build on Ultranet?
cta.subheadline: Talk to our team. We'll find the right fit for your stack.

footer.tagline: Distributed Ultranet — Connecting the AI-Native World
footer.address: 6D-07, No.5, Sec.5, Xinyi Rd., Taipei City 110202, Taiwan
